summary: Comprehensive testing of 'Segundo Cérebro da Estrategista' AI features. All critical functionalities working: Authentication, Funil de Vendas with visual funnel builder, Criar Ensaio Fotográfico (Nano Banana image generation), and Estrategista Digital chat. Backend 100% pass rate (11/11 tests). Frontend navigation and integrations fully functional.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge in bottom-right corner - minor visual element, not blocking functionality

passed_tests: Funil de Vendas: AI generates structured funnel with 4 stages (Atração, Qualificação, Oferta, Fechamento) - PASSED
Funil de Vendas: Visual funnel display with leads count and conversion rates - PASSED
Funil de Vendas: Metrics display (CPL, LTV) - PASSED
Criar Ensaio Fotográfico: Text-only prompt generates image via Nano Banana - PASSED
Criar Ensaio Fotográfico: Image returned as base64 data URL - PASSED
Estrategista Digital: AI chat responds with methodology (Leoa, MISSÃO, Oferta) - PASSED
Editor Nano Banana: Validation for missing image - PASSED
Análise de Perfil: Validation for missing image - PASSED
Navigation: All 8 sidebar sections accessible - PASSED
Navigation: Dashboard, Estrategista, Análise, Ensaio, Biblioteca, Objeção, Funil, Editor - all visible
critical_code_review_comments: SalesFunnel.js: Good funnel parsing implementation with multiple regex patterns for different AI response formats
PhotoshootCreator.js: Daily limit (20) well implemented with proper counter state
ImageEditor.js/ProfileAnalysis.js: Proper file upload handling with FileReader API
All components correctly use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from environment
seed_data_creation: None needed - test user already exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: All AI image generation features (Nano Banana) are working. The gemini-3-pro-image-preview model with modalities=['image', 'text'] is correctly configured. Funil de Vendas creates visual funnel graphs. Editor Nano Banana and Análise de Perfil require actual image uploads to fully test (validation works). Test user test@test.com/test123 is available.

features_verified_working.funil_vendas: AI generates structured funnel with visual graph (Atração 500 -> Qualificação 50 -> Oferta 20 -> Fechamento 5)
features_verified_working.ensaio_fotografico: Nano Banana generates high-quality images from text prompts
features_verified_working.estrategista_digital: AI chat follows Andressa Mallinsk methodology
